- [x] Verify that the copilot-instructions.md file in the .github directory is created.

- [x] Clarify Project Requirements
  Banking system with user authentication, account management, transactions, transfers, and balance tracking using Node.js Express backend, SQLite database, and vanilla JavaScript frontend.

- [x] Scaffold the Project
  Project structure created with backend, frontend, and database files.
  - Backend: Express server with SQLite database
  - Frontend: Single-page application with HTML/CSS/JS
  - Database: SQLite3 with users, accounts, transactions, and transfers tables

- [x] Customize the Project
  All core banking features implemented:
  - User registration and login
  - Multiple account management
  - Deposit/withdrawal functionality
  - Fund transfers between accounts
  - Transaction history tracking
  - Profile management

- [x] Install Required Extensions
  No extensions needed for this project.

- [x] Compile the Project
  No compilation needed. Ready to run as-is.

- [x] Create and Run Task
  Start the backend server with: npm start (in backend directory)
  Open frontend/index.html in a browser

- [x] Launch the Project
  Backend: npm start in backend directory (runs on port 5000)
  Frontend: Open frontend/index.html in web browser

- [x] Ensure Documentation is Complete
  README.md created with full project documentation and usage instructions.
